title: Evidence Upload (Pre-Signed URL Pattern)
content: participant BLOB as Azure Blob Storage

B->>BFF: POST /api/actions/{id}/evidence
Body {file_name, file_type, file_size, description}
(metadata only — no file content)

API->>API: Validate file metadata
(type whitelist, size ≤ 50MB)

API->>BLOB: Generate pre-signed upload URL
container: actions-evidence/{tenant_id}/{action_id}/{evidence_id}
write-only, expires 1h

B->>BLOB: PUT file bytes to pre-signed URL
(direct upload — file never traverses API)

API->>API: OWASP-compliant validation
magic-byte match, type whitelist, size ≤ 50MB
API->>BLOB: Read blob, compute SHA-256 hash

API->>DB: UPDATE evidence
SET status='uploaded', sha256_hash=@hash
WHERE id=@eid AND status='pending'
